title: Dyspnea

presenting_history.text: Defines chronic adult breathlessness as a primary-care presentation and limits the pathway to chronic rather than acute or subacute symptoms.
presenting_history.rationale: Supports mapped adult nonacute dyspnoea and breathlessness presentation terms.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Defines chronic adult breathlessness as a primary-care presentation and limits the pathway to chronic rather than acute or subacute symptoms.

source.title: Adult breathlessness pathway (pre-diagnosis): diagnostic pathway support tool

exact_section.heading: Purpose of this support tool; Scope of the problem

red_flags.text: Lists chest pain, haemoptysis, cyanosis, inability to speak in sentences, confusion, unilateral leg swelling, stridor, rapid progression, and low oxygen saturation.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-documented safety and escalation fields without asserting a diagnosis.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists chest pain, haemoptysis, cyanosis, inability to speak in sentences, confusion, unilateral leg swelling, stridor, rapid progression, and low oxygen saturation.

source.title: Adult breathlessness pathway (pre-diagnosis): diagnostic pathway support tool

red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-decided safety-netting and referral documentation for high-risk deterioration.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports documentation of high-risk deterioration and clinician-led urgent referral or escalation without mapping dose-bearing treatment content.

exact_section.heading: Red flags and urgent referral for worsening heart failure

examination.text: Specifies onset and associated history, functional impact, exposures, medication context, vital signs, respiratory effort, cardiac and chest examination, and selected investigations.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped symptom, assessed-negative, vital-sign, cardiopulmonary examination, and initial-test fields.
examination.evidence_extract: Specifies onset and associated history, functional impact, exposures, medication context, vital signs, respiratory effort, cardiac and chest examination, and selected investigations.

source.title: Adult breathlessness pathway (pre-diagnosis): diagnostic pathway support tool

exact_section.heading: Key points — initial presentation, examination, and investigations

examination.text: Specifies history, physical examination, and clinician-selected initial investigations for chronic persistent breathlessness.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-performed or reviewed ECG, oxygen, vital-sign, blood-count, renal, and chest-imaging fields.
examination.evidence_extract: Specifies history, physical examination, and clinician-selected initial investigations for chronic persistent breathlessness.

source.title: Adult breathlessness pathway (pre-diagnosis): diagnostic pathway support tool

exact_section.heading: Diagnostic pathway — clinical assessment and initial investigations

examination.text: Supports clinical history and examination, NT-proBNP, echocardiography, ECG, chest X-ray, renal, thyroid, liver, lipid, glucose, blood count, and urinalysis review.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped natriuretic-peptide and echocardiography review fields in an adult heart-failure context.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports clinical history and examination, NT-proBNP, echocardiography, ECG, chest X-ray, renal, thyroid, liver, lipid, glucose, blood count, and urinalysis review.

source.title: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.12 — history, examination, natriuretic peptides, imaging, ECG, and laboratory tests

assessment.text: Supports worsening breathlessness, orthopnoea or paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnoea, weight increase, oedema or abdominal distension, blood pressure, heart rate, oxygen saturation, JVP, pulmonary findings, and peripheral oedema documentation.
assessment.rationale: Supports mapped orthopnoea or PND, oedema, JVP, and peripheral-oedema documentation in worsening heart failure.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports worsening breathlessness, orthopnoea or paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnoea, weight increase, oedema or abdominal distension, blood pressure, heart rate, oxygen saturation, JVP, pulmonary findings, and peripheral oedema documentation.

source.title: Cheshire and Merseyside Heart Failure Pathway

medication.text: Supports review of functional capacity, fluid status, rhythm, cognition, nutrition, medication, renal function, haemoglobin or iron status, deterioration, monitoring frequency, and support needs.
medication.rationale: Was reviewed for chronic cardiac monitoring context; no additional generic dyspnoea item is mapped.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports review of functional capacity, fluid status, rhythm, cognition, nutrition, medication, renal function, haemoglobin or iron status, deterioration, monitoring frequency, and support needs.

source_limitations: Acute dyspnoea, children, and emergency treatment are outside the primary pathway scope.
Syncope, D-dimer, tracheal position, generic clinician plans, medication or diuretic plans, and generic or fixed follow-up remain unsupported.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
